urdu transliteration text: Bhai bhai pukarti rahi mai,phir bhi khanjar nahi ruka amma
english translation text: I kept calling for my brother but the dagger didn't stop, Mother

urdu transliteration text:
shimr ne ki phir aisi ghustakhi..(2) mujhse dekha nahi gaya amma
I couldn't watch shimr's insolence, Mother
bhai bhai pukarti rahi mai,phir bhi khanjar nahi ruka amma
english translation text: I kept calling for my brother but the dagger didn't stop, Mother

urdu transliteration text:
Tum jo zulfe sawara karti thiunhi zulfo mein haath tha uskajaha'n bose diye they nana ne
Were the same ones shimr held
english translation text:
The locks of hair that you used to brush
Where The Prophet used to kiss

urdu transliteration text:
usi gardan se khoo'n tapakta thasare shabbir yu uthaye hueshimr khaime tak aagaya amma
Carrying the head of Hussain
english translation text:
Is the neck where blood poured
He reached our camp, Mother

urdu transliteration text: bhai bhai pukarti rahi mai,phir bhi khanjar nahi ruka amma
english translation text: I kept calling for my brother but the dagger didn't stop, Mother

urdu transliteration text:
Dekh kar mujhko bayn karte hueshimr har baar muskarata raha
shimr saw me lament for Hussain
meri nazro ke saamne zalimwaar ginkar churi chalata raha
english translation text:
I witnessed the oppressor
attack with the knives
there were precisely…

urdu transliteration text:
haye 13 zarbe thi kund khanjar thaaur shabbir ka gala amma
And Hussain's throat, Mother
bhai bhai pukarti rahi mai,phir bhi khanjar nahi ruka amma
english translation text: I kept calling for my brother but the dagger didn't stop, Mother

urdu transliteration text:
Charo janib se gher rakha thatere noore nazar ko lashkar neteer barsata tha koi uspar
Surrounded from all 4 sides
Some rained arrows onto him
english translation text: Was the light of your eyes

urdu transliteration text: koi patthar se maarta thahaye ret zakhmo pe wo girata rahajisko patthar nahi mila amma
english translation text:
Some threw rocks at Him
And those who couldn't find rocks poured sand on his wounds, Mother

urdu transliteration text: bhai bhai pukarti rahi mai,phir bhi khanjar nahi ruka amma
english translation text: I kept calling for my brother but the dagger didn't stop, Mother

urdu transliteration text: Haye jab chalaya tha shimr ne khanjarmaine aanko'n se apni dekha thahaath apne uthake pehlu se
english translation text:
When shimr ran his dagger
I witnessed with my own eyes
You lifted your hands

urdu transliteration text: haath apne uthake pehlu setune sukhe gale pe rakha tha
english translation text:
You lifted your hands
And placed them on Hussain's parched throat

urdu transliteration text: ungliya'n zakhmi hogayi hongihaath mujhse to naa chupa amma
english translation text:
Your fingers must be injured
Don't hide your hands from me, Mother

urdu transliteration text: bhai bhai pukarti rahi mai,phir bhi khanjar nahi ruka amma
english translation text: I kept calling for my brother but the dagger didn't stop, Mother
